title: Jojo-Bizarre: Stand Eternal
description: this modpack let you feel a true Jojo reference
body:
# 🎭 Jojo-Blocky Bizarre: Stand Eternal
**"The path of the righteous is chosen by their spirit."**

Welcome to **Stand Eternal**, the premier JoJo's Bizarre Adventure experience for Minecraft 1.20.1. This pack is built to be fast, balanced, and—most importantly—totally immersive for every player.

---

### 🌟 Everyone Can Be a Stand User
In this world, power isn't reserved for a lucky few. We have specifically configured the experience so that **every single player has the potential to awaken their Stand.** * **The Awakening:** Find or craft the legendary Stand Arrows to manifest your life energy.
* **Master the Abilities:** From the time-altering powers of *The World* to the explosive strength of *Star Platinum*, every ability is at your fingertips.
* **Intense Combat:** Engage in high-speed Stand battles with custom animations and optimized hit detection.

### 🚀 Modpack Features
* **JoJo-Centric Gameplay:** Carefully selected mods to provide the most authentic 1.20.1 JoJo experience.
* **Performance First:** Pre-installed with Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight. No lag, even during heavy Stand rushes.
* **Discord Integration:** Show off your current Stand and status to your friends via Discord Rich Presence.
* **Custom Configs:** Balanced spawns and loot tables to make survival feel like a true "Bizarre Adventure."

### 🛠️ How to Begin
1. **Discover:** Search the world for Stand-related artifacts or custom structures.
2. **Summon:** Use your spirit (Default keys: 'V' or 'B') to call forth your Stand.
3. **Evolve:** Seek out rare items to push your Stand past its limits into Requiem forms.

---
*Developed by MØULAKC Team. Your destiny is waiting.*

---
## 🛠️ Private Technical Support
Found a glitch? To keep our community page clean and spoilers-free, all bug reports are handled privately. 

**How to report:**
Please send a private message/email to: MOULAKC@proton.me
**Please include:**
* What you were doing when the bug happened
* Your game logs (if it crashed)

Credits: Twilight Forest, JCraft, Cataclysm, Corpse, Cosmetic Armor.
